session.user: Run `ty check packages/erk-mcp/` and report the results. Do NOT fix any errors — just report them.
session.assistant: I'll run the type checker on the erk-mcp package and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Type check erk-mcp package with ty

session.tool_result: All checks passed! session.assistant:
ty passed: All checks passed!
**Note:** The type checker reports "No python files found under the given path(s)" — this indicates that either the `packages/erk-mcp/` directory doesn't contain Python files, or they're structured in a way that ty isn't detecting. You may want to verify the directory structure of the erk-mcp package.
